title: T-006 — Drizzle migration: changeover_events table + RLS
prompt:
# T-006 — Drizzle migration: changeover_events table

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.7, §16.4 V-PROD-23

## Goal
Add Drizzle migration creating changeover_events per §9.7 with risk_level CHECK constraint, ext_jsonb for L3 schema-driven extensions (D9), RLS.

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/changeover-events.ts: PK id UUID, tenant_id, line_id text NOT NULL, wo_from_id/wo_to_id REFERENCES work_orders, allergen_from text[], allergen_to text[], risk_level CHECK IN ('low','medium','high','segregated'), started_at NOT NULL, completed_at, planned_duration_min, actual_duration_min, cleaning_completed default false, cleaning_checklist JSONB, atp_required default false, atp_result JSONB, dual_sign_off_status default 'pending', first_signer/_at, second_signer/_at, ext_jsonb (D9 L3 extension). Add CHECK chk_changeover_time (started_at < completed_at OR completed_at IS NULL) for V-PROD-23. Indexes idx_changeover_line_time, idx_changeover_wo_from, idx_changeover_wo_to. RLS by tenant_id.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/changeover-events.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_changeover_events.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/changeover-events-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given INSERT with risk_level='unknown', when run, then CHECK constraint rejects with values list ('low','medium','high','segregated')
2. Given INSERT with completed_at < started_at, when run, then chk_changeover_time CHECK rejects (V-PROD-23)
3. Given migration applied, when changeover_events queried, then ext_jsonb column exists for D9 L3 schema-driven tenant fields

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting risk_level CHECK + chk_changeover_time before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test changeover-events-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not extend risk_level enum without ADR
- Do not omit ext_jsonb (breaks D9 L3 extension promise)
- Do not skip RLS

pipeline_inputs.description: changeover_events table with risk_level CHECK, chk_changeover_time, ext_jsonb (D9 L3), RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Mirror §9.7 SQL. risk_level CHECK IN ('low','medium','high','segregated'). cleaning_checklist + atp_result + ext_jsonb all JSONB. dual_sign_off_status default 'pending'. Add CHECK constraint chk_changeover_time (V-PROD-23: started_at < completed_at when completed_at NOT NULL). Three indexes. RLS by tenant_id.
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen gate logic
Do not implement cleaning checklist UI
acceptance_criteria: Given INSERT risk_level='unknown', when run, then CHECK rejects
Given INSERT completed_at < started_at, when run, then chk_changeover_time rejects (V-PROD-23)
Given migration applied, when describing table, then ext_jsonb JSONB column present (D9 L3)
test_strategy: RED: schema test asserting risk_level CHECK and chk_changeover_time present before schema exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test changeover-events-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not change risk_level allowed values
